Solar built to last, by a team you can trust.

We install the highest-quality solar panel systems and back them up with a 30-year warranty.

Trusted by homeowners and installers — featuring leading solar brands:

What Ethical Solar Does

Solar is not just panels — it’s a complete system. We design, install, and support solar + storage solutions that reduce bills, improve reliability, and deliver long-term savings.

Service Overview

Get a free solar assessment

Residential Solar

Problem It Solves: High electricity bills and unpredictable rate increases.

What You Get: Site assessment, system design, premium panels + inverter, clean installation.

How It Supports Savings: Cuts monthly bills and increases home value with long-term energy security.

Commercial Solar

Problem It Solves: Rising operating costs are eating into profit margins.

What You Get: Energy audit, scalable design, performance modelling, compliant commercial install.

How It Supports Savings: Reduces overhead, improves sustainability reporting, and stabilizes energy spend.

Battery Storage

Problem It Solves: Grid outages and peak-hour costs reduce reliability and savings.

What You Get: Battery sizing, backup setup, smart load control, hybrid-ready configuration.

How It Supports Savings: Stores solar for night use, improves resilience, and increases ROI over time.

Maintenance & Monitoring

Problem It Solves: Systems underperform without anyone noticing.

What You Get: Production monitoring, health checks, cleaning guidance, warranty support.

How It Supports Savings: Protects performance year-round and maximizes lifetime savings.

Want a clear estimate for your property? We’ll model your roof, show expected production, and explain incentives available in your area.

Get a free solar assessment

We’ll create a custom model of your home, and show you how solar looks, what it will cost, and what solar incentives are available.

Our services

Solar for Home

Take control of your power with custom-designed rooftop solar. We design a system around your roof and budget.

Ground-Mounted Solar

If your roof is shaded or unsuitable, ground-mounted solar gives you maximum performance.

Solar for Small Business

Lower operating costs and lock in predictable bills. Capture incentives while keeping operations running.

Solar Battery Backup

Stay powered during outages. Store excess solar energy and use it when you need it most, day or night.

Battery Installation

Professional installation and seamless integration. Configured for safety, efficiency, and easy monitoring.

Smart Panel Installation

Upgrade to smart panels for control. Monitor usage, optimise loads, and make the most of your system.

What We Do

We design and install reliable solar + storage systems for homes and businesses — with clear pricing, quality components, and long-term support.

ETHICAL SOLAR

Solar Installation Overview

Residential Solar

Custom rooftop solar systems designed for your home, usage, and budget — built to maximize long-term savings.

Explore Residential solar

Commercial Solar

Scalable solar solutions for businesses to reduce operating costs and improve sustainability performance.

Explore commercial solar

Battery Storage

Store energy for nights and outages. Add backup power and smarter savings with modern battery systems.

Explore battery options

Maintenance & Monitoring

Ongoing monitoring, performance checks, and maintenance support to keep your system running at its best.

View support plans

Who We Build Solar For

Ethical Solar partners with homeowners and businesses to design solar + storage systems that reduce costs, improve reliability, and deliver long-term savings.

Homeowners (Residential)

For families who want lower power bills and long-term energy independence. We design clean, high-performance rooftop solar systems.

Explore Residential solar

Commercial & Industrial

For businesses that want to reduce operating costs and improve sustainability metrics with scalable solar solutions.

See commercial solar

Battery & Backup

For anyone who wants protection from outages and better savings by storing solar energy for night use and peak times.

Explore battery storage

Maintenance & Monitoring

For existing systems that need peak performance. Monitoring, inspections, and support to maximize lifetime production.

View maintenance plans

Different properties. One goal: reliable savings with a solar system designed to last.

30 Years

Panel Performance Warranty with long-term reliability assurance.

25+10 Years

25 Years Product Warranty on Panels and 10 Years Product Warranty on Inverters & Batteries.

70–90%

Bill reduction is possible for most properties, depending on usage and system size.
